messages.content:
Suggested ways to overcome info overload


1) I will sit in the seat of meditation daily.

2) I will practice everyday an hour of voice rest, during my waking hours.

3) I will stay away from technology for one hour everyday.

4) I will practice, one day a month, abstinence from all forms of information technology.

5) I will not forcefully read all that is there in the newspaper and magazines!?!

6) I will watch only one news telecast per day.

7) I will neither watch TV mindlessly, nor surf the web aimlessly.

8) I will practice gazing through one sense for a few minutes daily and practice it with different senses everyday.  That is, let my eyes gaze at a candlelight for a few minutes and give complete rest to the rest of the senses.   The next day I will let my nose be with some aroma, while the remaining senses rest.  Engage the ears with chosen music, while the remaining senses practice sensual restraint.

9) Take time to be with the lap of nature on a regular basis, for nature is never soaring to the senses.

10)  Above all, at least once a year, I will escape to a destination, which is free from all these manmade overloads, where only spiritual loading is possible.  I will retreat and recreate myself.  I mean I will re-create myself.
